zh.Saint Davids, Saint Bride's Bay, Pembrok: 威爾士布洛可爾聖 戴維斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Rev. William Meyrick於1546年出生在威爾士布洛可爾聖 戴維斯時，他的父親Sir John Meyrick33歲，母親Sage Griffith Davis25歲。他於1570年與Janet Verch Ienen在威爾士布洛可爾聖 戴維斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他在英國威爾斯布洛可爾被列為rector of st. david's。他去世於1596年在他的家鄉享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rev. William Meyrick于1546年出生在威尔士布洛可爾聖 戴維斯时，他的父亲Sir John Meyrick33岁，母亲Sage Griffith Davis25岁。他于1570年与Janet Verch Ienen在威尔士布洛可爾聖 戴維斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他在英国威尔斯布洛可爾被列为rector of st. david's。他去世于1596年在他的家乡享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Meyrick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Merrick
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Meuric, the Middle Welsh form of Maurice (see Morris ).
Irish: borrowed from Welsh. In Ireland, when this is not the Welsh name, it might be adopted for Irish Ó Mearadhaigh, see Merry 2.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Rev. William Meyrick was born in 1546, in St Davids, Pembrokeshire, Wales, his father, Sir John Meyrick, was 33 and his mother, Sage Griffith Davis, was 25. He married Janet Verch Ienen in 1570, in St Davids, Pembrokeshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. His occupation is listed as rector of st. david's in Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom. He died in 1596, in his hometown, at the age of 50.

fr.St Davids, Pembrokeshire, Wales: St Davids, Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rev. William Meyrick est né en 1546, à St Davids, Pembrokeshire, Galles, son père, Sir John Meyrick, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Sage Griffith Davis, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Janet Verch Ienen en 1570, à St Davids, Pembrokeshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est rector of st. david's à Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé en 1596, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.St Davids, Pembrokeshire, Wales: St Davids, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Rev. William Meyrick 1546 in St Davids, Pembrokeshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Meyrick 33 und seine Mutter Sage Griffith Davis 25. Er hat 1570 in St Davids, Pembrokeshire, Wales Janet Verch Ienen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als rector of st. david's in Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb 1596 im Alter von 50 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.St Davids, Pembrokeshire, Wales: St Davids, Pembrokeshire, Galles, Regno Unito
it.lifeSummary: Quando Rev. William Meyrick è nato il nel 1546 nel St Davids, Pembrokeshire, Galles, il suo padre, Sir John Meyrick, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Sage Griffith Davis, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Janet Verch Ienen nel 1570, nel St Davids, Pembrokeshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come rector of st. david's nel Pembrokeshire, Galles, Regno Unito. Morì nel 1596, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Rev. William Meyrickが1546年にウェールズペンブロケシュアイアスト ダヴィズで生まれた時，父Sir John Meyrickは33歳，母Sage Griffith Davisは25歳であった。1570年にウェールズペンブロケシュアイアスト ダヴィズでJanet Verch Ienenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。イギリスウェールズペンブロケシュアイアでの職業はrector of st. david'sと記録されている。彼は1596年に故郷で50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Rev. William Meyrick(이)가 1546년 웨일스 p브로케실르 스트 데이비드즈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Meyrick(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Sage Griffith Davis(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1570년 웨일스 p브로케실르 스트 데이비드즈에서 Janet Verch Ienen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 웨일스 p브로케실르에서 rector of st. david's이었다. 그는 1596년 그의 고향에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rev. William Meyrick nasceu em 1546, em St Davids, Pembrokeshire, Gales, seu pai, Sir John Meyrick, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Sage Griffith Davis, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Janet Verch Ienen em 1570, em St Davids, Pembrokeshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como rector of st. david's em Pembrokeshire, Gales, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 1596, em sua cidade natal, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rev. William Meyrick родился в 1546 г. в местности ст дэвидс, пемброкешир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Sir John Meyrick было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Sage Griffith Davis, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Janet Verch Ienen в 1570 г. в местности ст дэвидс, пемброкешир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери.  Он работал по профессии rector of st. david's в местности пемброкешир, Уэльс, Великобритания. Он умер в 1596 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 50 лет.

Se casó con Janet Verch Ienen en 1570, en St Davids, Pembrokeshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era rector of st. david's en Pembrokeshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Murió en 1596, en su pueblo, a la edad de 50 años.
